title: Open resources and tools.
desc: Scripts, calculators, and reference tools we are gradually making available, built for battery engineers and energy storage teams.

items.title: BESS Sizing Calculator
items.desc: Input your load profile, get battery plus inverter sizing recommendations. Built on real tender evaluation methodology from utility-scale projects.

items.title: Cell Compatibility Checker
items.desc: Check whether two battery cells are safe to parallel based on capacity, chemistry, and age. Thresholds from 100+ LFP cycle validation studies.

items.title: SOH Estimator — Python Notebook
items.desc: Open-source Jupyter notebook for estimating State of Health from OCV-IR data. Get a degradation report and trend visualization from your own test data.

items.title: AI Battery Failure Pattern Library
items.desc: Searchable database of battery failure modes, RCA examples, and recommended remediation, built from real incident reviews and engineering documentation.
